name: Team Bonding Activity
description: Captures team bonding moments outside of football — dinners, activities, celebrations, and squad events that show team chemistry and culture.
guidelines: Fun, candid, and unscripted. Show the genuine relationships between players — laughter, jokes, friendly competitions, team dinners. 15-45 seconds. Use trending fun/viral audio. Minimal branding — the content should feel organic and personal. Great for humanizing the squad and showing team chemistry. These posts typically generate high engagement. Ensure all players consent to appearing.
